name: road_traffic_accident_severity_prediction_leeds
description: Croissant JSON-LD metadata record for the DBRepo-accessed ML input dataset used in the road traffic accident severity prediction experiment. The dataset is based on the Leeds road traffic accidents data and is accessed through DBRepo to reconstruct the ML-ready accident severity feature table for model training and analysis.

isBasedOn.name: Road traffic accidents
isBasedOn.description: Information on accidents across Leeds. Data includes location, number of people and vehicles involved, road surface, weather conditions and severity of casualties.

distribution.name: DBRepo REST API distribution
distribution.description: The dataset is accessed for this experiment through the DBRepo REST API. The final experiment retrieves the required relational tables from DBRepo and reconstructs the ML-ready dataframe.

distribution.name: Original European data portal record
distribution.description: Original public dataset record for Road traffic accidents published by Leeds City Council.

recordSet.name: accident_severity_ml_ready_dataset
recordSet.description: ML-ready accident severity dataset reconstructed from DBRepo tables accident, person, accident_casualty, and related lookup tables.

field.name: easting
field.description: Easting coordinate of the accident location.

field.name: northing
field.description: Northing coordinate of the accident location.

field.name: number_of_vehicles
field.description: Number of vehicles involved in the accident.

field.name: road_class
field.description: Road class at the accident location.

field.name: road_surface
field.description: Road surface condition at the time of the accident.

field.name: lighting
field.description: Lighting condition at the time of the accident.

field.name: weather
field.description: Weather condition at the time of the accident.

field.name: person_id
field.description: Identifier of the person involved in the accident.

field.name: age
field.description: Age of the person involved in the accident.

field.name: sex
field.description: Sex category of the person involved in the accident.

field.name: vehicle
field.description: Vehicle category involved in the casualty record.

field.name: casualty_class
field.description: Casualty class or role of the person in the accident.

field.name: casualty_severity
field.description: Casualty severity label used as the prediction target.
